title: Insight
content:
Power that by obedience grows,
    Knowledge which its source not knows,
    Wave which severs whom it bears
    From the things which he compares,
    Adding wings through things to range,
    To his own blood harsh and strange.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Ralph Waldo Emerson, titled "Insight", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
